replacements.rationale: arXiv 2510.10572 'Understanding Self-supervised Contrastive Learning through Supervised ...' — primary research source directly on the query topic (DuckDuckGo pos=1). Replaces the dropped SemanticScholar Supervised Contrastive Learning paper with its underlying arXiv primary source.

top_10.rationale: Official Keras documentation — example 'Self-supervised contrastive learning with NNCLR'. Official library documentation showing contrastive learning implementation directly on topic.
Official Keras documentation — example 'Self-supervised contrastive learning with SimSiam'. Second official Keras contrastive learning example, covering non-contrastive variant of SSL.
Official PyTorch Lightning documentation — Tutorial 13 on Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning with SimCLR. Official library docs with full tutorial and code.
ReadTheDocs official UvA Deep Learning course notebooks — Tutorial 17 on Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning with SimCLR. Official course documentation with comprehensive implementation.
SimCLR (Chen et al.) — canonical reference paper for contrastive self-supervised learning of visual representations. The primary technical reference for the topic.
Comprehensive PDF survey 'Self-supervised Learning: Generative or Contrastive' — the authoritative survey reference covering the full landscape of SSL including contrastive methods.
CVPR Open Access PDF 'Contrasting Contrastive Self-Supervised Representation Learning Pipelines' — systematic analysis of contrastive SSL pipelines, directly addressing pipeline-level understanding.
MDPI open-access survey 'A Survey on Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning' — comprehensive survey covering objectives, augmentations, and applications of contrastive SSL.
IEEE 'Contrasting Contrastive Self-Supervised Representation Learning' — analytical study examining what drives success in contrastive SSL, authoritative peer-reviewed reference.
